title: Analog Fear
description: This is a horror modpack that adds many different horror mods that all work perfectly together. Ranging from stalkers, to fear inducing noises, this modpack is meant to induce fear upon you.
body:
This is a horror modpack that adds many different horror mods that all work perfectly together. Ranging from stalking creatures, to fear inducing noises, this modpack is the ultmate fear generator.

This mod mainly uses Essential
This mod also uses Simple Voice Chat and Voiceless Survival. Make sure to set that up!

It is recommended to play on singleplayer

  [FEATURES][PLEASE READ]
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

THESE MODS WILL STALK YOU...

THESE MODS WILL MESS WITH YOU...

THEY WILL INDUCE FEAR UPON YOU...

THEY WILL MAKE YOU PARANOID...

THESE MODS ARE NOT TO BE TAKEN LIGHTLY...

PLAY AT YOUR OWN RISK!!!

</details>

[OPTIONAL MODS LIST][PLEASE READ]
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
TACZ TIMELESS AND CLASSICS (Gun mod)
  
BAD DREAMS (Chance to have nightmares when sleeping)

BETTER CAVE DWELLER (Cave dweller who hit the gym)

ENHANCED VISUALS (Realistic damage effects)(Recommended to keep)

HORROR MESSAGES (Spooky message every 10-15 minutes)(Can be configured)

MINDLY PRESENCE (Can cause lag)(Remove if laggy)

TENSE AMBIENCE (Spooky cave noises)

THE ANOMALY REPHASED (Has very loud jumpscares)

THE BOILED ONE REMASTERED (Also has very loud jumpscares)

THE MIMICER (Will be main root of fear)

THE ONE WHO WATCHES (Also main root of fear)(Recommended to keep)

</details>
